resultList.dtldesc: Live in style with this spacious and comfortable 4 BHK residential house for sale in Iyyappanthangal, Chennai. Specifically suited for bigger families, it provides a perfect mix of convenience and contemporary living in a well-settled area.::::::Property Specifications::::::Located in the well-developed locality this 4 BHK residential property boasts generous space and good design on two floors.Consisting of a carpet area of 1080 sqft, this G+1 semi-furnished apartment is ideal for families seeking comfort, usability, and Vaastu friendliness.::::::The ground floor has a spacious living area, one bedroom, a common western toilet with a geyser, a modular kitchen facility with a chimney fitment, and a dedicated puja room for prayer purposes. A balcony offers a healthy outdoor area, and a utility area is separately attached to the kitchen to cater to daily work.::::::The house has an eastward orientation, thus providing plenty of natural light and positive energy in the form of sunlight throughout the day. Schools, hospitals, and shopping facilities like malls and supermarkets are all within a 1 km radius, meeting the primary needs of families. Public transportation is readily available, with the bus stand at a distance of just 200 to 300 meters. A new metro station in the same distance will also enhance connectivity, and future value to the property will be added. Banks and ATM facilities are also readily accessible in the vicinity, making this an all-round residential area for a comfortable urban life.::

resultList.dtldesc: Nestled in the vibrant and rapidly developing locality of Sholinganallur, Chennai, this stunning 3 BHK Flat available for sale in PS Srijan Nexterra Phase 1 offers a perfect sanctuary for families and professionals alike. Designed for those who seek a luxurious yet comfortable lifestyle, this newly constructed residence provides a spacious and well-lit environment, complemented by high-end amenities and seamless connectivity to key destinations. ::::::Property Specifications ::::::Facing the most prominent east direction, this 5 to 10-year-old property welcomes ample natural light and ventilation, thereby creating a comfortable and pleasant atmosphere. This spacious and Vastu-compliant flat spans a super built-up area of 1175 sq ft and is situated on the 4th floor of the complex. The semi-furnished flat features 3 well-designed bedrooms and 2 western bathrooms with a geyser. Here, one bathroom is attached to the bedroom and the other bathroom is available for common use. ::::::A balcony attached to the bedroom provides a serene view and a perfect space to unwind. The living cum dining area is thoughtfully planned, offering ample space for relaxation and entertainment. Furthermore, the modular kitchen comes with a chimney, a granite platform, a stainless steel sink, and a piped gas connection, along with an attached utility area for added convenience. The flooring throughout the apartment is of premium vitrified tiles, ensuring a sleek and elegant look.::::::Facilities ::::::PS Srijan Nexterra Phase 1 provides a host of world-class facilities for a comfortable and secure lifestyle. It includes covered parking, a 24-hour water supply and 100% power backup to guarantee uninterrupted daily living.  There is also a dedicated security guard, CCTV surveillance, and one lift for easy access to higher floors. ::::::Residents can enjoy several amenities, including a clubhouse, a dedicated kids' play area, a senior citizen walking area, a well-equipped gym, a party hall, and a luxurious swimming pool, making it a complete lifestyle destination.::::::Locality ::::::PS Srijan Nexterra Phase 1 is nestled close to the Bollineni Zion and at the rear end of the flat complex which are the nearest landmarks. Some of the famous shopping malls and supermarkets are within a 1km range, while a variety of grocery stores are conveniently located nearby, adding to the ease of living in this sought-after neighbourhood. There are also a couple of leading banks and ATM centers nestled in the vicinity. ::::::Many esteemed schools and well-known hospitals are within a 1km radius which is an added benefit. Public transport, including buses and autos, is readily available, making commuting hassle-free. The upcoming metro station is just a 5-minute drive away, further enhancing connectivity. Additionally, the Outer Ring Road (ORR) is merely 5 km from the property, providing seamless travel options. ::
